title: IPA assembly for PacBio Hifi reads
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"c9ofp","text":"This protocol is regarding the assembly of plant genomes using HiFi data (PacBio Sequel II) with Improved Phase Assembly (IPA) tool.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

Genomes were assembled in the High performance computing (HPC) system, at University of Queensland, using following commands: ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bq6kd","text":"$ conda create --prefix /mnt/beegfs/usr/ipaM","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3fia1","text":"$ conda activate /mnt/beegfs/usr/ipaM","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7kqet","text":"$ conda install validate","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5pdk3","text":"$ ipa local --nthreads 24 --njobs 1 -i (input files)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3jpa2","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"","data":{"guid":"9D353ADCB2D711EB894D0A58A9FEAC02","url":"https://github.com/PacificBiosciences/pbipa"}}}}
steps: Steps: 1) ccs.bam files were generated by PacBio Sequel II (Hifi) platform for all the plant species, used to assemble the genome using IPA tool. 2) The IPA tool was installed using the conda environment, following the link: https://github.com/PacificBiosciences/pbipa
The above screenshot shows the commands used for generating the IPA assembly
creator: Priyanka Sharma
